zh.lifeSummary: 當Florence Darell於1425年出生在英國維爾爾利特萊可特 白 伍頓 巴塞特時，她的父親Sir William Darell41歲，母親Elizabeth de Calston25歲。她於大約1450年與Thomas Brugge在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年在英國格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆享年81歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Florence Darell于1425年出生在英国維爾爾利特萊可特 白 伍頓 巴塞特时，她的父亲Sir William Darell41岁，母亲Elizabeth de Calston25岁。她于大约1450年与Thomas Brugge在英国維爾爾拉姆斯波利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1506年在英国格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆享年81岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Darell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Florence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

variants.name: Florance
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Florence Darell was born in 1425, in Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir William Darell, was 41 and her mother, Elizabeth de Calston, was 25. She married Thomas Brugge about 1450, in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1506, in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire: Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Florence Darell est née en 1425, à Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Darell, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Calston, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Brugge environ 1450, à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1506, à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire: Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Florence Darell 1425 in Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Darell 41 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Calston 25. Sie hat um 1450 in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England Thomas Brugge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1506 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Brugge circa 1450, nel Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1506, nel Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Florence Darellが1425年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアリットレコット ビー ウットオン バセットで生まれた時，父Sir William Darellは41歳，母Elizabeth de Calstonは25歳であった。約1450年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーでThomas Bruggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1506年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムで81歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire: 영국 윌츠히르 리틀렉트 비 보턴 배싯
ko.lifeSummary: Florence Darell(이)가 1425년 영국 윌츠히르 리틀렉트 비 보턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Darell(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Calston(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에서 Thomas Brugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 영국 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Florence Darell nasceu em 1425, em Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Darell, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Calston, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Brugge aproximadamente 1450, em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1506, em Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire: литлекотт би вуттон бассетт, уилцхир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Florence Darell родилась в 1425 г. в местности литлекотт би вуттон бассетт, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Darell было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Calston, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Brugge около 1450 г. в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1506 г. в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Florence Darell nació en 1425, en Littlecott by Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Darell, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Calston, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Thomas Brugge aproximadamente 1450, en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1506, en Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
